/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libgtest_main.so -o libgtest_main.so CMakeFiles/gtest_main.dir/src/gtest_main.cc.o   -L/home/adeye/adeye-core/build/adeye_msgs/gtest/gtest/src  -Wl,-rpath,/home/adeye/adeye-core/build/adeye_msgs/gtest/gtest/src:/home/adeye/adeye-core/build/adeye_msgs/gtest/gtest -lpthread libgtest.so -lpthread
